predictions.source_quote: strategists think the S&P 500 index could decline 5% in 2022 while other developed markets could end the year higher.
Japan's stock market could appreciate 12% next year.
Our combined earnings and valuation assumptions suggest that European stocks can deliver an 8% price return and double-digit total return
strategists recommend underweighting U.S. Treasuries - particularly those with intermediate maturities - in expectation of the 10-year Treasury moving past 2% by the end of 2022.
His team believes oil could top $90 a barrel in 2022 as rising demand meets relatively spare capacity.
